title: dtr-demo
text:
1段階のDTR

Q学習のデモンストレーション

DTRの推定

モデル式

\begin{aligned}
& Y\mid\left(X=x,A=a\right)\sim \mathrm{N}\left(Q\left(x,a\right),1^2\right) & X\sim \mathrm{U}\left(0,1.5\right)\\
& Q\left(x,a\right)=\mathrm{E}\left[Y\mid X=x,A=a\right]=x+a-ax & X\perp A
\end{aligned}



シミュレーションデータの生成

set.seed(20230928)
n <- 10000

x <- runif(n, 0, 1.5)
a <- rbinom(n, 1, 0.5)
y <- rnorm(n, x + a * (1 - x), 1)



シミュレーションデータの描画


Code
sample_qdemo <- tibble(
    x = x,
    a = a,
    trt = paste("A", "=", a, sep = " "),
    y = y
)

g_sample_qdemo <- sample_qdemo |> ggplot() +
    geom_point(mapping = aes(x = x, y = y, color = trt), size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", mapping = aes(x = x, y = y, color = trt), se=FALSE, linewidth = 2) +
    labs(color = "Treatment")
g_sample_qdemo


`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'









なお、a=0 or 1 のときの Y の条件付き期待値はそれぞれ以下のとおりとなる。

\begin{cases}
Q\left(x,0\right)=\mathrm{E}\left[Y\mid X=x,A=0\right]&=x+0-0 \cdot x \\
&=x & \text{if $a=0$,} \\
Q\left(x,1\right)=\mathrm{E}\left[Y\mid X=x,A=1\right]&=x+1-1 \cdot x \\
&=1 & \text{if $a=1$.}
\end{cases}



交互作用項モデルの当てはめ

fit <- lm(y ~ x * a)
summary(fit)


Call:
lm(formula = y ~ x * a)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-3.6295 -0.6736 -0.0040  0.6802  3.6572 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)  0.07468    0.02841   2.628  0.00859 ** 
x            0.94461    0.03267  28.916  < 2e-16 ***
a            0.90828    0.04014  22.626  < 2e-16 ***
x:a         -0.90466    0.04641 -19.494  < 2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 1.002 on 9996 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.08799,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.08771 
F-statistic: 321.5 on 3 and 9996 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16


Coefficientsを使うので、以下のとおり格納する。

co <- coef(fit)

推定した最適DTR（ポリシー）は以下のとおりとなる。 
\hat{d}\left(x\right) = \mathrm{I}\left(0.90828−0.90466x > 0\right)




価値の評価

価値関数と推定価値関数

\begin{aligned}
V\left(d\right) &= \mathrm{E}\left[Q\left(X,1\right)\mathrm{I}\left(d\left(X\right) = 1\right) + Q\left(X,0\right)\mathrm{I}\left(d\left(X\right) = 0\right)\right] \\
\hat{V}\left(\hat{d}\right) &= \frac{1}{n}\sum_i\left[Q\left(x_i,1\right)\mathrm{I}\left(\hat{d}\left(x_i\right) = 1\right) + Q\left(x_i,0\right)\mathrm{I}\left(\hat{d}\left(x_i\right) = 0\right)\right]
\end{aligned}



価値（関数）の推定

d_func <- function(x, co1, co2) {
    return(as.integer(co1 + x * co2 > 0))
}

xayq_opt <- tibble(
    x = x,
    a = a,
    a_opt = d_func(x, co["a"], co["x:a"]),
    y = y,
    q1 = co["(Intercept)"] + x * co["x"] + 1 * co["a"] + 1 * x * co["x:a"],
    q0 = co["(Intercept)"] + x * co["x"] + 0 * co["a"] + 0 * x * co["x:a"],
    q_opt = ifelse(a_opt == 1, q1, q0)
) |>
mutate(i = row_number())

t_xayq_opt <- xayq_opt |>
    slice_head(n = 5) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_number(columns = c("x", "y", "q1", "q0", "q_opt"), decimals = 5) |>
    cols_label("x" = html("x<sub>i</sub>"), "a_opt" = html("a<sub>opt</sub>"), "q1" = html("Q(x<sub>i</sub>,1)"), "q0" = html("Q(x<sub>i</sub>,0)"), "q_opt" = html("Q<sub>opt</sub>")) |>
    cols_move_to_start("i")
t_xayq_opt

meany_v_hat <- xayq_opt |>
    summarise(mean_y = mean(y), v_hat = mean(q_opt))

t_meany_v_hat <- meany_v_hat |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_number(columns = c("mean_y", "v_hat"), decimals = 5) |>
    cols_label("mean_y" = "Mean of y", "v_hat" = "V-hat")
t_meany_v_hat





  
    
    
      Mean of y
      V-hat
    
  
  
    0.89965
1.08629
  
  
  







推定価値の評価

推定したDTRで治療を行った場合のテストデータの生成

set.seed(20230928 + 1)
n <- 10000

x_test <- runif(n, 0, 1.5)
a_test <- d_func(x_test, co["a"], co["x:a"])
y_test <- rnorm(n, x_test + a_test * (1 - x_test), 1)



テストデータに対して推定DTRによる治療を行った場合の価値の推定

meany_v_hat_test <- meany_v_hat |>
    mutate(mean_y_test = mean(y_test))

t_meany_v_hat_test <- meany_v_hat_test |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_number(columns = c("mean_y", "v_hat", "mean_y_test"), decimals = 5) |>
    cols_label("mean_y" = "Mean of y", "v_hat" = "V-hat", "mean_y_test" = "Mean of y (test)")
t_meany_v_hat_test





  
    
    
      Mean of y
      V-hat
      Mean of y (test)
    
  
  
    0.89965
1.08629
1.08627
